content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: review(patch)
H: header_spoof_auth_bypass ⇒ AttackerSpoofsHeader
P: strip_untrusted_header("x-user-id") → prefer(session_userId)
V: test_requests_with_valid_header ∧ test_requests_without_header ∧ check_session_userId_usage
R: ! unauthorized_access ∧ ! session_tampering ∧ ! data_leak
A: VerifySessionLogic ∧ EnsureSecureHeaderHandling

[AUDIT]
Treat header_spoof_auth_bypass as a trust-boundary issue and apply strip_untrusted_header("x-user-id") before merge.
